name: Center
description: Flexbox helper that centers its children on both axes.

api.name: Center
api.description: Flexbox helper that centers its children on both axes.

parameters.name: Height
parameters.description: Explicit CSS height (e.g. "100vh", "20rem") applied as an inline style. When unset, defaults to h-full so the element fills its parent's height.

parameters.name: Inline
parameters.description: When true, uses inline-flex instead of flex for the centering container. Default is false.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The content to center both horizontally and vertically.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root element.

examples.title: With Fixed Height
examples.code:
<Center Height="200px">
    <Stack Align="center" Gap="2">
        <DynamicIcon Name="Image" Class="h-8 w-8 text-muted-foreground" />
        <Text Color="muted" Size="sm">No image selected</Text>
    </Stack>
</Center>

examples.title: Inline Center
examples.code:
<Text>
    Click the
    <Center Inline="true" Class="h-6 w-6 rounded bg-primary/20 mx-1">
        <DynamicIcon Name="Plus" Class="h-3 w-3 text-primary" />
    </Center>
    icon to add an item.
</Text>

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The content to center both horizontally and vertically.

mdSummary:
# Center

Flexbox helper that centers its children on both axes.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Layout
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/center

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Center | Height | `string?` | `` | Explicit CSS height (e.g. "100vh", "20rem") applied as an inline style. When unset, defaults to h-full so the element fills its parent's height. |
| Center | Inline | `bool` | `false` | When true, uses inline-flex instead of flex for the centering container. Default is false. |
| Center | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The content to center both horizontally and vertically. |
| Center | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root element. |
| Center | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root element. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Center) — The content to center both horizontally and vertically.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Center />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/Center/Center.razor`
